home.title: PMP-Produkt | Interior doors and custom carpentry | Svidník
home.description: Quality custom interior doors and complete carpentry work. Kitchens, built-in wardrobes and custom furniture. Family company with a showroom in Svidník.

about.title: About us - Custom interior doors
about.description: Meet PMP-Produkt, a manufacturer of quality custom interior doors. A family company with international experience and a showroom in Svidník.

custom.title: Custom interior doors
custom.description: Atypical interior doors made exactly to your dimensions. Quality materials, professional installation and free measuring.

standard.title: Standard interior doors
standard.description: Standard interior doors according to STN norms. Quality standard doors for your home with fast delivery.

configurator.title: Interior door configurator
configurator.description: Online configurator for interior doors. Choose the type, model, colour and additional parameters. Free quotation.

advice.title: Advice - How to measure doors correctly
advice.description: Guide on how to correctly measure and prepare the opening for interior doors. Instructional video and tips from PMP-Produkt.

references.title: References - Interior doors
references.description: Gallery of completed custom interior door projects. See our references from real installations in Svidník and the surrounding area.

blog.title: Blog - News and articles about doors
blog.description: News and articles about interior doors, living trends and carpentry production from PMP-Produkt.

contact.title: Contact - Interior doors Svidník
contact.description: Contact PMP-Produkt for custom interior doors. Showroom in Svidník, free measuring and quotation.

inquiry.title: Send an inquiry for custom doors
inquiry.description: Fill in the form and send an inquiry for custom interior doors. Free quotation from PMP-Produkt.

table.title: Interior door size chart
table.description: Complete chart of standard interior door dimensions according to STN norms. Rebated and flush options.

about.title: Carpentry - Custom furniture and kitchens
about.description: PeMa Carpentry - a family company with rich international experience. Kitchens, built-in wardrobes, furniture and custom interiors in Svidník.

wardrobes.title: Built-in wardrobes made to measure - PeMa Carpentry
wardrobes.description: Built-in wardrobes with custom 18 mm laminated chipboard carcasses, 2 mm ABS edges and Blum runners. Quality without compromise in Svidník.

references.title: References - Carpentry and custom furniture
references.description: Gallery of completed carpentry projects. Kitchens, built-in wardrobes and custom furniture. Explore our references.
